sentence: 他们队赢得了今年的篮球联赛冠军。
pinyin: Tā men duì yíng dé le jīn nián de lán qiú lián sài guàn jūn.
english: Their team won the basketball league championship this year.

sentence: 孩子出生后要按时接种疫苗。
pinyin: Háizi chūshēng hòu yào ànshí jiēzhòng yìmiáo.
english: After a baby is born, vaccines need to be given on schedule.

sentence: 父母的价值观对孩子影响很大。
pinyin: Fùmǔ de jiàzhíguān duì háizi yǐngxiǎng hěn dà.
english: Parents' values have a great influence on children.

sentence: 我截图把这条消息发给你看看。
pinyin: Wǒ jié tú bǎ zhè tiáo xiāo xī fā gěi nǐ kàn kàn.
english: I'll take a screenshot of this message and send it to you.

sentence: 公司的服务器昨天出了故障，网站打不开。
pinyin: Gōng sī de fú wù qì zuó tiān chū le gù zhàng, wǎng zhàn dǎ bù kāi.
english: The company's server had a malfunction yesterday, so the website couldn't be accessed.

meaning: 1. to cultivate; 2. cultivation; 3. to further; 4. to encourage
sentence: 这个村子靠养殖鱼虾为生。
pinyin: Zhège cūnzi kào yǎngzhí yú xiā wéishēng.
english: This village makes its living by raising fish and shrimp.

meaning: to not calculate; to not count; to not be considered (as); to have no
sentence: 这点小事不算什么，别担心。
pinyin: Zhè diǎn xiǎo shì bù suàn shén me, bié dān xīn.
english: This little thing doesn't count for much, don't worry about it.

meaning: consumer goods; means of livelihood; means of subsistence; documents r
sentence: 超市里的生活资料很齐全，买东西很方便。
pinyin: Chāo shì lǐ de shēng huó zī liào hěn qí quán, mǎi dōng xī hěn fāng biàn.
english: The supermarket has a full range of daily necessities, so shopping there is very convenient.

meaning: to come up with an idea; generation of ideas; inspiration
sentence: 这个活动的发想来自一次偶然的聊天。
pinyin: Zhè gè huó dòng de fā xiǎng lái zì yī cì ǒu rán de liáo tiān.
english: The inspiration for this event came from a chance conversation.

sentence: 两点之间若处于等位，电流就不会流动。
pinyin: Liǎng diǎn zhī jiān ruò chǔ yú děng wèi, diàn liú jiù bú huì liú dòng.
english: If two points are at equipotential, no current will flow between them.

sentence: 每件快递都有一个独特的编号。
pinyin: Měi jiàn kuài dì dōu yǒu yī gè dú tè de biān hào.
english: Every parcel has a unique tracking number.

meaning: to say nothing of; not to mention; let alone
sentence: 别说跑步了，他连走路都费力。
pinyin: Bié shuō pǎo bù le, tā lián zǒu lù dōu fèi lì.
english: Not to mention running — he even struggles to walk.

meaning: to accomplish the objective; to succeed
sentence: 做任何事都要认真，这样才能成事。
pinyin: Zuò rèn hé shì dōu yào rèn zhēn, zhè yàng cái néng chéng shì.
english: You have to be serious about everything you do — that's the only way to succeed.

meaning: official website (abbr. for 官方網站|官方网站[guan1 fang1 wang3 zhan4])
sentence: 买机票最好去航空公司的官网购买。
pinyin: Mǎi jī piào zuì hǎo qù háng kōng gōng sī de guān wǎng gòu mǎi.
english: It's best to buy plane tickets directly from the airline's official website.

sentence: 系统的数据库需要定期备份。
pinyin: Xìtǒng de shùjùkù xūyào dìngqī bèifèn.
english: The system's database needs to be backed up regularly.

meaning: 1. to open fire; 2. to shoot a gun
sentence: 警察对着天空开枪警告人群。
pinyin: Jǐngchá duìzhe tiānkōng kāiqiāng jǐnggào rénqún.
english: The police fired shots into the air to warn the crowd.

sentence: 董事会今天开会讨论新计划。
pinyin: Dǒngshìhuì jīntiān kāihuì tǎolùn xīn jìhuà.
english: The board of directors met today to discuss the new plan.

sentence: 热带地区全年气温都很高。
pinyin: Rèdài dìqū quán nián qìwēn dōu hěn gāo.
english: Temperatures in tropical regions are high all year round.

sentence: 很多网民对这件事发表了看法。
pinyin: Hěn duō wǎng mín duì zhè jiàn shì fā biǎo le kàn fǎ.
english: Many Internet users shared their opinions on the matter.

sentence: 父母慢慢老去，我们应该多陪陪他们。
pinyin: Fù mǔ màn màn lǎo qù, wǒ men yīng gāi duō péi péi tā men.
english: As our parents slowly get older, we should spend more time with them.

sentence: 他叔叔在陆军服役了十年。
pinyin: Tā shūshu zài lùjūn fúyì le shí nián.
english: His uncle served in the army for ten years.

sentence: 买新手机还是修旧手机？前者更划算。
pinyin: Mǎi xīn shǒujī háishi xiū jiù shǒujī? Qiánzhě gèng huásuàn.
english: Buy a new phone or repair the old one? The former is more cost-effective.

meaning: 1. speech sounds; 2. pronunciation; 3. colloquial (rather than literar
sentence: 我用语音输入法发了一条消息。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng yǔ yīn shūrùfǎ fā le yī tiáo xiāoxi.
english: I sent a message using voice input.

sentence: 这家公司的物流速度很快。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de wùliú sùdù hěn kuài.
english: This company's logistics are very fast.

meaning: 1. to act the leading role (in a movie or a play); 2. to star; 3. lead
sentence: 这部电影由他主演，票房很不错。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yóu tā zhǔ yǎn, piàofáng hěn búcuò.
english: This movie stars him in the lead role and did quite well at the box office.

sentence: 城乡之间的收入差距在缩小。
pinyin: Chéng xiāng zhī jiān de shōu rù chā jù zài suō xiǎo.
english: The income gap between cities and the countryside is narrowing.

meaning: to inspect; (law) to prosecute; to investigate
sentence: 检察机关对此案展开了调查。
pinyin: Jiǎnchá jīguān duì cǐ àn zhǎnkāi le diàochá.
english: The procuratorate launched an investigation into this case.

sentence: 学语言不仅仅是背单词。
pinyin: Xué yǔ yán bù jǐn jǐn shì bèi dān cí.
english: Learning a language is not just about memorizing vocabulary.

meaning: vocational high school (abbr. to 技校[ji4 xiao4])
sentence: 他没考上大学，就去读了技术学校。
pinyin: Tā méi kǎo shàng dà xué, jiù qù dú le jì shù xué xiào.
english: He didn't get into university, so he enrolled in a vocational school.

sentence: 他在境外工作了两年才回来。
pinyin: Tā zài jìng wài gōng zuò le liǎng nián cái huí lái.
english: He worked outside the country for two years before coming back.

sentence: 她来台已经三年了，普通话说得很好。
pinyin: Tā lái tái yǐ jīng sān nián le, pǔ tōng huà shuō de hěn hǎo.
english: She has been in Taiwan for three years now and speaks Mandarin very well.

sentence: 孩子们在海滩上堆沙堡。
pinyin: Háizimen zài hǎitān shang duī shābǎo.
english: The kids are building sandcastles on the beach.

sentence: 早晨的空气特别清新。
pinyin: Zǎochén de kōngqì tèbié qīngxīn.
english: The morning air is especially fresh.

sentence: 编辑正在修订这本书的第二版。
pinyin: Biānjí zhèngzài xiū dìng zhè běn shū de dì èr bǎn.
english: The editor is revising the second edition of this book.

sentence: 请按照类别把这些书整理好。
pinyin: Qǐng ànzhào lèibié bǎ zhèxiē shū zhěnglǐ hǎo.
english: Please sort these books by category.

sentence: 这款手机的厂商宣布下个月发布新型号。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī de chǎngshāng xuānbù xià gè yuè fābù xīn xínghào.
english: The manufacturer of this phone announced that a new model will be released next month.

sentence: 政府用税收来建设公共设施。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ yòng shuìshōu lái jiànshè gōnggòng shèshī.
english: The government uses tax revenue to build public facilities.

sentence: 这本书里有关于做爱的健康知识。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū lǐ yǒu guān yú zuò ài de jiàn kāng zhī shí.
english: This book contains health information about making love.

meaning: 1. (of a pupil) to write down (in a dictation exercise); 2. dictation;
sentence: 老师每周五都给我们做听写练习。
pinyin: Lǎoshī měi zhōuwǔ dōu gěi wǒmen zuò tīngxiě liànxí.
english: The teacher gives us a dictation exercise every Friday.

meaning: 1. to reveal; 2. to publish; 3. to make public; 4. to announce
sentence: 公司在年报中披露了详细的财务数据。
pinyin: Gōngsī zài niánbào zhōng pīlù le xiángxì de cáiwù shùjù.
english: The company disclosed detailed financial data in its annual report.

meaning: good person; healthy person; person who tries not to offend anyone, ev
sentence: 他真是个好人，总是帮助别人。
pinyin: Tā zhēn shì gè hǎorén, zǒng shì bāngzhù biérén.
english: He is truly a good person who always helps others.

meaning: 1. according to the situation; 2. pragmatic; 3. random
sentence: 系统随机分配座位号码。
pinyin: Xìtǒng suíjī fēnpèi zuòwèi hàomǎ.
english: The system randomly assigns seat numbers.

sentence: 他宣称这个产品绝对无副作用。
pinyin: Tā xuānchēng zhège chǎnpǐn juéduì wú fùzuòyòng.
english: He claimed this product has absolutely no side effects.

sentence: 这本书的封面设计很有创意。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū de fēngmiàn shèjì hěn yǒu chuàngyì.
english: The cover design of this book is very creative.

sentence: 此前他从来没有出过国。
pinyin: Cǐ qián tā cóng lái méi yǒu chū guò guó.
english: Before this, he had never been abroad.

meaning: 1. to check; 2. to inquire; 3. to consult (a document etc); 4. inquiry
sentence: 你可以在官网上查询快递的物流状态。
pinyin: Nǐ kě yǐ zài guān wǎng shàng chá xún kuài dì de wù liú zhuàng tài.
english: You can check the shipping status of your parcel on the official website.

sentence: 她毕业后进入了影视行业。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu jìnrùle yǐngshì hángyè.
english: After graduating, she entered the film and television industry.

sentence: 长江流域的气候比较温暖湿润。
pinyin: Cháng Jiāng liú yù de qì hòu bǐ jiào wēn nuǎn shī rùn.
english: The climate in the Yangtze River basin is relatively warm and humid.

sentence: 他一放学就回家打游戏，不做作业。
pinyin: Tā yī fàng xué jiù huí jiā dǎ yóu xì, bù zuò zuò yè.
english: As soon as school is out, he goes home to play games instead of doing homework.

sentence: 她头上戴着一顶红色的帽子很可爱。
pinyin: Tā tóu shàng dài zhe yī dǐng hóng sè de mào zi hěn kě ài.
english: The red hat she has on her head looks really cute.
